rules.default_asset_strategy: procedural geometry and generated materials first

placeholders.name: M2 Source-Defined Room Network
placeholders.format: runtime Babylon.js procedural meshes from TypeScript room definitions
placeholders.scale_notes: Five connected 8 by 8 meter office rooms arranged as lobby, cubicles, conference, records, and elevator placeholder.
placeholders.style_notes: Clean fluorescent corporate-surreal rooms with readable signage and calm liminal office geometry.
placeholders.replacement_notes: Future milestones can expand the room data with collectible placements, extraction behavior, Clarity variants, and hazard anchors.

placeholders.name: M1 Office Shell
placeholders.scale_notes: Single 14 by 14 meter office-like room with 3.15 meter ceiling and first-person player scale.
placeholders.style_notes: Beige carpet, fluorescent office lights, concrete columns, glass panel, clean but wrong corporate tone.
placeholders.replacement_notes: Replaced in M2 by m2-room-network; keep as historical proof only.

placeholders.name: M1 Incident Report Placeholder
placeholders.format: runtime Babylon.js plane with DynamicTexture text
placeholders.scale_notes: Small paper-sized plane placed on the desk at readable first-person height.
placeholders.style_notes: Readable office paperwork with restrained red accent; no external asset file.
placeholders.replacement_notes: Replaced in M3 by source-defined Incident Report collectibles; keep as historical proof only.

placeholders.name: M3 Incident Report Collectibles
placeholders.format: runtime Babylon.js planes with DynamicTexture text and TypeScript placement data
placeholders.scale_notes: Three paper-sized reports placed on reachable office surfaces in the lobby, cubicles, and elevator room.
placeholders.style_notes: Readable office paperwork with restrained red accents and dry corporate-surreal report text.
placeholders.replacement_notes: M9 may replace DynamicTexture paperwork with generated texture sheets while preserving report IDs and source placement data.

placeholders.name: M1 Elevator Placeholder
placeholders.scale_notes: Door-sized frame and panels on the front wall.
placeholders.style_notes: Corporate metal doorway with EXIT REQUEST PENDING sign.
placeholders.replacement_notes: M4 should attach extraction behavior and win/restart flow to the elevator.

placeholders.name: M1 DOM HUD Placeholder
placeholders.scale_notes: Responsive full-screen overlay sized for desktop browser smoke testing.
placeholders.style_notes: Dry corporate status panel with restart button and minimal guidance.
placeholders.replacement_notes: M3 and later should expand HUD for report count, Clarity, and system feedback.
